title: Prefer built-in generic types over the typing module in type hints
description: Avoid using the typing module for built-in generic types. This can lead to potential compatibility issues.
message: Avoid using typing module for built-in generic types

noncompliant.description: Uses typing module for built-in generic types

why_is_this_an_issue: Using the typing module can lead to compatibility issues with other libraries
how_to_fix: Replace typing module with built-in generic types
